commands_run: coord claim "all-kernel non-shell external HTTP carrier"
failure_reason: Lifted plaintext external http_get into the emitted fourth kernel as tag 105 with a native DNS/TCP/socket/write/read carrier. The same probe kept Go/Rust/TypeScript HTTPS model-vitality capture green at verdict 127. Fourth-arm TLS/HTTPS remains the named next carrier gap.
